rationale: The two papers are tightly aligned on goal-progress dynamics: the citing paper centers on responses to subgoal success and persistence/licensing, while the cited paper provides core evidence on goal gradients and illusionary goal progress in repeated effort contexts. Given this conceptual overlap and the cited paper’s likely role as a foundational mechanism/theory source in this literature, this is not safely an obvious incidental mention. With only DOI-level match and no in-text context, it should still be retained for full relation judgment rather than dropped.
